news.title:
Godawari Power And Ispat gets nod for 6.91 MW waste heat recovery plant.
The plant will convert industrial waste heat into electricity.
news.summary:
Godawari Power And Ispat gets nod for 6.91 MW waste heat recovery plant.
The plant will convert industrial waste heat into electricity.

news.title:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd to hold a virtual one-on-one meeting with Nirmal Bang Securities on April 3, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd to hold a virtual one-on-one meeting with Nirmal Bang Securities on April 3, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on the company's website.

news.title:
Godawari Power shares surged 5.7% after reporting record FY26 production in iron ore, pellets, and power.
The firm plans a ₹7,000 crore integrated steel plant in Raipur with 1 MTPA capacity.
news.summary:
Godawari Power shares surged 5.7% after reporting record FY26 production in iron ore, pellets, and power.
The firm plans a ₹7,000 crore integrated steel plant in Raipur with 1 MTPA capacity.

news.title: Godawari Power's iron ore pellet production at 2.86MT missed 3MT guidance.
news.summary: Godawari Power's iron ore pellet production at 2.86MT missed 3MT guidance.

news.title:
Godawari Power reports record iron ore and steel production in FY2025-26.
Iron ore production reached 2.75MT, slightly below the 3MT guidance.
news.summary:
Godawari Power reports record iron ore and steel production in FY2025-26.
Iron ore production reached 2.75MT, slightly below the 3MT guidance.

news.title:
Sensex rose 1,205 pts to 75,273.45; Nifty gained 394.05 pts to 23,306.45.
Godawari Power & Ispat surged 5%, signaling a bullish breakout; support at 273.
news.summary:
Sensex rose 1,205 pts to 75,273.45; Nifty gained 394.05 pts to 23,306.45.
Godawari Power & Ispat surged 5%, signaling a bullish breakout; support at 273.

news.title:
Godawari Power board approves 1.00 MTPA steel plant with ₹7000 crore investment.
Project to be financed via debt, internal funds, and completed in 3.5 years.
news.summary:
Godawari Power board approves 1.00 MTPA steel plant with ₹7000 crore investment.
Project to be financed via debt, internal funds, and completed in 3.5 years.

news.title:
Godawari Energy Ltd merges with Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd as per NCLT's sanction.
Effective from March 23, 2026, with an appointed date of April 1, 2025; compliance steps completed.
news.summary:
Godawari Energy Ltd merges with Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd as per NCLT's sanction.
Effective from March 23, 2026, with an appointed date of April 1, 2025; compliance steps completed.

news.title:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd held its EGM on March 14, 2026, via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved a resolution amending the MOA to include logistics and rail transport activities.
news.summary:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd held its EGM on March 14, 2026, via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved a resolution amending the MOA to include logistics and rail transport activities.

news.title:
Godawari Power shares surged 6.8% to ₹267.85 after converting OCRPS into equity in its subsidiary, GNEPL.
The conversion raised Godawari's holding in GNEPL to 100%, valued at ₹198.9 Cr, without additional cash infusion.
news.summary:
Godawari Power shares surged 6.8% to ₹267.85 after converting OCRPS into equity in its subsidiary, GNEPL.
The conversion raised Godawari's holding in GNEPL to 100%, valued at ₹198.9 Cr, without additional cash infusion.

news.title:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd held EGM on 14.03.2026, passing a resolution amending its Object Clause.
Voting results showed 99.999% approval, with participation from promoters, institutions, and non-institutional shareholders.
news.summary:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd held EGM on 14.03.2026, passing a resolution amending its Object Clause.
Voting results showed 99.999% approval, with participation from promoters, institutions, and non-institutional shareholders.

news.title:
Godawari Energy Ltd merges into Godawari Power & Ispat Ltd; approved by NCLT Cuttack with effective date April 1, 2025.
Amalgamation aims to enhance group synergies; no new shares issued as Godawari Energy is wholly owned by Godawari Power & Ispat.
news.summary:
Godawari Energy Ltd merges into Godawari Power & Ispat Ltd; approved by NCLT Cuttack with effective date April 1, 2025.
Amalgamation aims to enhance group synergies; no new shares issued as Godawari Energy is wholly owned by Godawari Power & Ispat.

news.title:
GPIL sold 16.87% stake in Ardent Steel for ₹40.5 Cr, reducing its holding to 20.98%.
The sale is part of a planned 37.85% exit valued at ₹90.87 Cr.
news.summary:
GPIL sold 16.87% stake in Ardent Steel for ₹40.5 Cr, reducing its holding to 20.98%.
The sale is part of a planned 37.85% exit valued at ₹90.87 Cr.

news.title:
Godawari Power received consent to operate at enhanced capacities for Sponge Iron and HB Wire divisions.
Capacity increased to 650,000 MTPA for Sponge Iron, 115,000 MTPA for HB Wire without additional investment.
news.summary:
Godawari Power received consent to operate at enhanced capacities for Sponge Iron and HB Wire divisions.
Capacity increased to 650,000 MTPA for Sponge Iron, 115,000 MTPA for HB Wire without additional investment.

news.title:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by CRISIL.
Long-term rating revised to 'AA Positive'; short-term rating remains 'A1'.
news.summary:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by CRISIL.
Long-term rating revised to 'AA Positive'; short-term rating remains 'A1'.

news.title:
Godawari Power anticipates 30% revenue growth in FY27.
The company plans to invest ₹2,500 crore for expansion efforts.
news.summary:
Godawari Power anticipates 30% revenue growth in FY27.
The company plans to invest ₹2,500 crore for expansion efforts.

news.title:
Godawari Power And Ispat gains environmental approval for Ari Dongri mine expansion.
The expansion is for the iron ore mines located in Chhattisgarh.
news.summary:
Godawari Power And Ispat gains environmental approval for Ari Dongri mine expansion.
The expansion is for the iron ore mines located in Chhattisgarh.

news.title:
Godawari Power's EBITDA rose 3.9%, with margins at 20.2% vs 17% YoY.
Whirlpool's EBITDA grew 31%, margin at 5.1% vs 4% YoY; HBL margins at 34.6%.
news.summary:
Godawari Power's EBITDA rose 3.9%, with margins at 20.2% vs 17% YoY.
Whirlpool's EBITDA grew 31%, margin at 5.1% vs 4% YoY; HBL margins at 34.6%.

news.title:
Godawari Power approves 2 billion rupees extra investment in its unit.
Firm sells 37.85% stake in Ardent Steels for 908.7 million rupees.
news.summary:
Godawari Power approves 2 billion rupees extra investment in its unit.
Firm sells 37.85% stake in Ardent Steels for 908.7 million rupees.

news.title:
Godawari Power's Q3 net profit decreased 1.1% to ₹143.2 crore; revenue fell 12.2% to ₹1,139 crore.
EBITDA rose 3.9% to ₹230.3 crore, with margin improving to 20.2% from 17% YoY.
news.summary:
Godawari Power's Q3 net profit decreased 1.1% to ₹143.2 crore; revenue fell 12.2% to ₹1,139 crore.
EBITDA rose 3.9% to ₹230.3 crore, with margin improving to 20.2% from 17% YoY.
